message:
feat(history): add FTS rebuild/repair and improve error logging

- Add rebuild_fts() function to recover from FTS index corruption
- Add repair() function for automatic health detection and repair
- Replace silent error suppression with proper tracing/logging
- Add logging for: worker thread spawn, channel sends, WAL checkpoints
- Add tests for FTS rebuild, repair, and trigger functionality
- Fix clippy warnings in normalize.rs and test files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
